caribbean.headline: East Swell and Heavy Rain for St. Lucia
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing east winds of 11 kt with significant wave heights near 5.4 ft and an east swell period of 7 s. I note a 100% rain probability for St. Lucia, and nearby Barbados is seeing winds up to 15 kt; mariners should expect choppy seas and brief heavy downpours around both ports.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas Near Mykonos Raise Small Craft Concerns
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northwest winds near 25 kt with seas to 5.4 ft and a 6 s north swell, while Cadiz reports lighter westerlies up to 18 kt. I expect Small Craft Advisory conditions for exposed waters around Mykonos and advise caution for tenders and small vessels, and overall rain chances remain less than 10% rain probability.
